eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 11:47 AM ON FEB 17, 2026 Effective until 07:47 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
A SAFE Alert has been issued for Phoenix, Arizona. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Phoenix Police Department is looking for Judy Thompson a black female, 63 years old, 5 feet 1 inch tall, 120 pounds, with brown hair and brown eyes. She was last seen on Tuesday, February 17, 2026, wearing a white/pink headscarf, dark color jacket, light color pants, dark color shoes. Judy was last seen in the area of South 14th Street and East Atlanta Avenue on foot. She suffers from a medical condition which may cause her to become confused and easily lost. Please contact the Phoenix Police Department with any information on Judy. 
If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
